content: Pinned app_links 6.4.1 contract (audited excerpt): AppLinks.getInitialLink returns Future<Uri?> for the link that launched the application. AppLinks.uriLinkStream emits Uri values received while the application is running. Android URL handling is registered with manifest intent filters; Dart stream filtering does not change which applications Android offers as handlers. When Flutter deep-link handling is disabled, the application integration owns delivery consistently. This snapshot supplies API semantics only and does not prescribe project files or a patch.
